findings.reason: The word 'คา' (khaa) has a low-class initial consonant with a long vowel and no tone mark, so it takes a mid tone, not high.
The word 'เหนื่อย' (nueai) has a high-class leading consonant (ห) with a mai ek (่) tone mark, which dictates a low tone, not falling.
The word 'ใหม่' (mai) has a high-class leading consonant (ห) with a mai ek (่) tone mark, which dictates a low tone, not falling.

findings.thai: ให้ยาตัวใหม่
findings.reason: The word 'ใหม่' (mai) takes a low tone, not falling.

findings.thai: อธิบายซ้ำหลายครั้ง
findings.reason: The word 'หลาย' (laai) has a high-class leading consonant (ห) with a long vowel, making it a rising tone. The word 'ครั้ง' (khrang) has a low-class initial consonant with a mai tho (้) tone mark, making it a high tone.
The word 'อยาก' (yaak) has a mid-class leading consonant (อ) acting as high/mid class equivalent for tone rules, with a dead ending, making it a low tone, not falling.

findings.thai: ออกกำลังกายสม่ำเสมอ
findings.reason: The word 'สม่ำเสมอ' (sa-mam-sa-mer) consists of 4 syllables: ส (low), ม่ำ (falling), เส (low), มอ (rising). The current tones array was missing a syllable and had incorrect tones for the latter part.

findings.thai: ออกแต่เช้า
findings.reason: The word 'แต่' (dtae) has a mid-class initial consonant with a mai ek (่) tone mark, making it a low tone. The word 'เช้า' (chao) has a low-class initial consonant with a mai tho (้) tone mark, making it a high tone.
